text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy little town, there lived a curious cat named Whiskers. Whiskers loved exploring every nook and cranny. One sunny day, after circling around the old oak tree that whispered secrets about the forest, Whiskers stumbled upon a hidden glade that glowed with a peculiar light.

Entering it, Whiskers discovered a group of wise old owls chatting endlessly. They told him tales of ancient trees that knew every leaf's history. But they warned him about something scary lurking just beyond the whispering trees… shadows that dreamed of night.

Feeling brave, Whiskers stayed just within the circle of the glowing trees. Hours passed. Whiskers listened to stars' whispers and watched shadows dance to ancient tunes. Then something strange happened—little by little, these dreaming shadows began to take tangible form. They grew arms and legs; their eyes widened with a curious intelligence.

These new shadows moved out of the glow, calling out,
